parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::int AS leads_last_24h,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND status = 'contacted')::int AS contacted_last_24h,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND status = 'pending')::int AS pending_last_24h,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE status = 'pending'
      AND created_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'
      AND COALESCE(facebook_lead_id, '') !~ '^TEST_'
  )::int AS stale_pending_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE path IN (2, 3)
      AND status IN ('pending', 'contacted')
      AND first_message_sent_at IS NULL
      AND created_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'
      AND COALESCE(facebook_lead_id, '') !~ '^TEST_'
  )::int AS stale_missing_first_message_count,
  MAX(created_at) AS last_fb_lead_at,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(t)) FROM (
      SELECT facebook_lead_id, status, path, agent_type, created_at, updated_at
      FROM fb_leads
      WHERE status = 'pending'
        AND created_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'
        AND COALESCE(facebook_lead_id, '') !~ '^TEST_'
      ORDER BY created_at ASC
      LIMIT 10
    ) t
  ), '[]'::json) AS stale_pending_leads,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(t)) FROM (
      SELECT facebook_lead_id, status, path, agent_type, created_at, updated_at
      FROM fb_leads
      WHERE path IN (2, 3)
        AND status IN ('pending', 'contacted')
        AND first_message_sent_at IS NULL
        AND created_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'
        AND COALESCE(facebook_lead_id, '') !~ '^TEST_'
      ORDER BY created_at ASC
      LIMIT 10
    ) t
  ), '[]'::json) AS stale_missing_first_message_leads
FROM fb_leads;

WITH active_fb AS (
  SELECT
    id,
    facebook_lead_id,
    path,
    agent_type,
    nome,
    telefone,
    first_message_sent_at,
    created_at,
    CASE WHEN LENGTH(telefone) = 13 THEN LEFT(telefone, 4) || SUBSTRING(telefone, 6) ELSE telefone END AS phone12
  FROM fb_leads
  WHERE path IN (2, 3)
    AND first_message_sent_at IS NOT NULL
    AND COALESCE(facebook_lead_id, '') !~ '^TEST_'
),
open_fb AS (
  SELECT af.*
  FROM active_fb af
  LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.fb_lead_id = af.id
  WHERE l.id IS NULL
),
user_after_first AS (
  SELECT ofb.id AS fb_lead_id, MAX(m.created_at) AS last_user_at
  FROM open_fb ofb
  JOIN ia_messages m
    ON (CASE WHEN LENGTH(m.phone) = 13 THEN LEFT(m.phone, 4) || SUBSTRING(m.phone, 6) ELSE m.phone END) = ofb.phone12
   AND m.direction = 'user'
   AND m.created_at > ofb.first_message_sent_at
  GROUP BY ofb.id
),
assistant_after_last_user AS (
  SELECT ofb.id AS fb_lead_id, MAX(m.created_at) AS assistant_after_last_user_at
  FROM open_fb ofb
  JOIN user_after_first uf ON uf.fb_lead_id = ofb.id
  LEFT JOIN ia_messages m
    ON (CASE WHEN LENGTH(m.phone) = 13 THEN LEFT(m.phone, 4) || SUBSTRING(m.phone, 6) ELSE m.phone END) = ofb.phone12
   AND m.direction = 'assistant'
   AND m.created_at > uf.last_user_at
  GROUP BY ofb.id
),
thread_state AS (
  SELECT ofb.id AS fb_lead_id, ofb.facebook_lead_id, ofb.path, ofb.agent_type, ofb.nome, ofb.telefone,
         ofb.first_message_sent_at, ofb.created_at,
         uf.last_user_at, aa.assistant_after_last_user_at,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - uf.last_user_at)) / 60 AS minutes_waiting
  FROM open_fb ofb
  LEFT JOIN user_after_first uf ON uf.fb_lead_id = ofb.id
  LEFT JOIN assistant_after_last_user aa ON aa.fb_lead_id = ofb.id
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE last_user_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::int AS user_messages_last_24h,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE assistant_after_last_user_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::int AS assistant_messages_last_24h,
  MAX(last_user_at) AS last_user_message_at,
  MAX(assistant_after_last_user_at) AS last_assistant_message_at,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE last_user_at IS NOT NULL
      AND assistant_after_last_user_at IS NULL
      AND last_user_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'
      AND last_user_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '60 minutes'
  )::int AS overdue_reply_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE last_user_at IS NOT NULL
      AND assistant_after_last_user_at IS NULL
      AND last_user_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '60 minutes'
  )::int AS stale_unreplied_count,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(x)) FROM (
      SELECT facebook_lead_id, nome, telefone, path, agent_type, first_message_sent_at, last_user_at, minutes_waiting
      FROM thread_state
      WHERE last_user_at IS NOT NULL
        AND assistant_after_last_user_at IS NULL
      ORDER BY last_user_at DESC
      LIMIT 10
    ) x
  ), '[]'::json) AS unreplied_threads
FROM thread_state;

SELECT
  MAX(created_at) FILTER (WHERE type = 'workflow_success' AND payload->>'workflow' = 'WF06') AS last_wf06_success_at,
  MAX(created_at) FILTER (WHERE type = 'workflow_success' AND payload->>'workflow' = 'WF07') AS last_wf07_success_at,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE type = 'workflow_success' AND payload->>'workflow' = 'WF06' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::int AS wf06_success_last_24h,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE type = 'workflow_success' AND payload->>'workflow' = 'WF07' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::int AS wf07_success_last_24h,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE type = 'infra_error' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::int AS infra_errors_last_24h,
  MAX(created_at) FILTER (WHERE type = 'infra_error') AS last_infra_error_at,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(t)) FROM (
      SELECT created_at, payload->>'workflow_name' AS workflow_name, payload->>'last_node' AS last_node, payload->>'error_message' AS error_message
      FROM events
      WHERE type = 'infra_error'
      ORDER BY created_at DESC
      LIMIT 5
    ) t
  ), '[]'::json) AS recent_infra_errors
FROM events;

WITH path3 AS (
  SELECT
    id,
    facebook_lead_id,
    nome,
    telefone,
    status,
    first_message_sent_at,
    created_at,
    updated_at,
    CASE WHEN LENGTH(telefone) = 13 THEN LEFT(telefone, 4) || SUBSTRING(telefone, 6) ELSE telefone END AS phone12
  FROM fb_leads
  WHERE path = 3
    AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
    AND COALESCE(facebook_lead_id, '') !~ '^TEST_'
),
user_reply AS (
  SELECT p.id AS fb_lead_id, MAX(m.created_at) AS last_user_reply_at
  FROM path3 p
  JOIN ia_messages m
    ON (CASE WHEN LENGTH(m.phone) = 13 THEN LEFT(m.phone, 4) || SUBSTRING(m.phone, 6) ELSE m.phone END) = p.phone12
   AND m.direction = 'user'
   AND p.first_message_sent_at IS NOT NULL
   AND m.created_at > p.first_message_sent_at
  GROUP BY p.id
),
assistant_after_reply AS (
  SELECT p.id AS fb_lead_id, MAX(m.created_at) AS last_assistant_after_reply_at
  FROM path3 p
  JOIN user_reply ur ON ur.fb_lead_id = p.id
  LEFT JOIN ia_messages m
    ON (CASE WHEN LENGTH(m.phone) = 13 THEN LEFT(m.phone, 4) || SUBSTRING(m.phone, 6) ELSE m.phone END) = p.phone12
   AND m.direction = 'assistant'
   AND m.created_at > ur.last_user_reply_at
  GROUP BY p.id
),
lead_record AS (
  SELECT p.id AS fb_lead_id, l.id AS lead_id, l.qualified_at
  FROM path3 p
  LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.fb_lead_id = p.id
),
assignment_record AS (
  SELECT lr.fb_lead_id, MAX(a.assigned_at) AS assignment_at, MAX(a.id::text) AS assignment_id
  FROM lead_record lr
  LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.lead_id = lr.lead_id
  GROUP BY lr.fb_lead_id
),
handoff_event AS (
  SELECT p.id AS fb_lead_id, MAX(e.created_at) AS handoff_at
  FROM path3 p
  LEFT JOIN lead_record lr ON lr.fb_lead_id = p.id
  LEFT JOIN events e
    ON e.type = 'handoff_complete'
   AND ((lr.lead_id IS NOT NULL AND e.payload->>'lead_id' = lr.lead_id::text)
      OR (CASE WHEN LENGTH(COALESCE(e.payload->>'phone', '')) = 13 THEN LEFT(e.payload->>'phone', 4) || SUBSTRING(e.payload->>'phone', 6) ELSE COALESCE(e.payload->>'phone', '') END) = p.phone12)
  GROUP BY p.id
),
base AS (
  SELECT p.*, ur.last_user_reply_at, aar.last_assistant_after_reply_at,
         lr.lead_id, lr.qualified_at, ar.assignment_id, ar.assignment_at, he.handoff_at,
         CASE
           WHEN ur.last_user_reply_at IS NULL THEN NULL
           WHEN lr.lead_id IS NULL AND ur.last_user_reply_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' THEN 'sem_lead'
           WHEN lr.lead_id IS NOT NULL AND ar.assignment_id IS NULL AND ur.last_user_reply_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' THEN 'sem_assignment'
           WHEN ar.assignment_id IS NOT NULL AND he.handoff_at IS NULL AND ur.last_user_reply_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' THEN 'sem_evento_handoff'
           WHEN aar.last_assistant_after_reply_at IS NULL AND ur.last_user_reply_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' THEN 'sem_resposta_assistente'
           ELSE NULL
         END AS issue
  FROM path3 p
  LEFT JOIN user_reply ur ON ur.fb_lead_id = p.id
  LEFT JOIN assistant_after_reply aar ON aar.fb_lead_id = p.id
  LEFT JOIN lead_record lr ON lr.fb_lead_id = p.id
  LEFT JOIN assignment_record ar ON ar.fb_lead_id = p.id
  LEFT JOIN handoff_event he ON he.fb_lead_id = p.id
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::int AS path3_last_24h,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND first_message_sent_at IS NOT NULL)::int AS path3_contacted_last_24h,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND first_message_sent_at IS NOT NULL AND last_user_reply_at IS NULL)::int AS awaiting_user_reply_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE last_user_reply_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::int AS path3_replied_last_24h,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE handoff_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::int AS handoffs_last_24h,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE lead_id IS NOT NULL AND qualified_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::int AS leads_created_last_24h,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE assignment_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::int AS assignments_last_24h,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE last_user_reply_at IS NOT NULL
      AND handoff_at IS NULL
      AND last_user_reply_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'
  )::int AS replied_without_handoff_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE last_user_reply_at IS NOT NULL
      AND last_assistant_after_reply_at IS NULL
      AND last_user_reply_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'
  )::int AS replied_without_assistant_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE lead_id IS NOT NULL
      AND assignment_id IS NULL
      AND last_user_reply_at IS NOT NULL
      AND last_user_reply_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'
  )::int AS lead_without_assignment_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE assignment_id IS NOT NULL
      AND handoff_at IS NULL
      AND last_user_reply_at IS NOT NULL
      AND last_user_reply_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'
  )::int AS assignment_without_handoff_event_count,
  MAX(handoff_at) AS last_handoff_at,
  MAX(last_user_reply_at) AS last_path3_reply_at,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(x)) FROM (
      SELECT facebook_lead_id, nome, telefone, status, created_at, first_message_sent_at, last_user_reply_at,
             last_assistant_after_reply_at, lead_id, assignment_id, handoff_at, issue
      FROM base
      WHERE issue IS NOT NULL
      ORDER BY last_user_reply_at DESC NULLS LAST, created_at DESC
      LIMIT 10
    ) x
  ), '[]'::json) AS stuck_path3_leads
FROM base;
